creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Trying to upgrade php80 (8.0.20) as of todays update of ports tree (-> 8.0.22), compiling lang/php80 quits with an obscure dtrace error out of the blue:

[...]
dtrace: failed to compile script /usr/ports/lang/php80/work/php-8.0.22/Zend/zend_dtrace.d: "/usr/lib/dtrace/psinfo.d", line 1: cannot translate from "struct thread *" to "lwpsinfo_t *"
*** [Zend/zend_dtrace_gen.h] Error code 1

make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/php80/work/php-8.0.22
1 error

make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/php80/work/php-8.0.22
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1
